---
title: ""
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-wordmark}
livefigures
:::

::: {.hero-tagline}
Editable, version-controlled figures as first-class Quarto citizens.
Reference the *source file* — or write the diagram inline — and
`quarto render` does the rest.
:::

```bash
quarto add seandavi/quarto-livefigures
```

No exported SVGs to maintain. No generated files in version control. The
source is the figure — and because every source is plain text or JSON,
**AI agents read, write, and diff your figures as easily as your code.**

## See it

This diagram is authored *inline in this page's source*, four lines of
nomnoml (@fig-hero):

```{.nomnoml #fig-hero fig-cap="A figure whose source you just read"}
#direction: right
[edit source] -> [quarto render]
[quarto render] -> [cached figure]
[cached figure] -> [HTML / PDF / slides]
```

And this one renders from
[`arch.excalidraw`](https://github.com/seandavi/quarto-livefigures/blob/main/site/gallery/figures/arch.excalidraw)
— a hand-drawn scene you can open and edit at
[excalidraw.com](https://excalidraw.com/) (@fig-hero2):

![The file is the figure](gallery/figures/arch.excalidraw){#fig-hero2 width=55%}

Captions, cross-references (like @fig-hero above), sizing, subfigures,
lightbox — click any figure — all behave exactly like native Quarto
figures, because they *are* native Quarto figures by the time Quarto sees
them.

## 18 formats, one pipeline {.format-badges}

**Local & offline:** `.excalidraw` `.vl.json` `.vg.json` `.dot` `.gv`
`.dbml` `.noml` `.wavedrom` `.bytefield`

**Via kroki:** `.puml` `.d2` `.c4` `.structurizr` `.erd` `.ditaa`
`.pikchr` `.svgbob` `.tikz`

Every format was chosen for **agent fluency** — text and JSON sources
LLMs author reliably. See the [gallery](gallery/index.qmd) for all of
them, live.

## Why

Diagrams-as-code tools occupy an awkward middle ground: editable sources,
static outputs, manual exports that go stale, and both checked into git.
livefigures removes the export step. Rendering happens inside
`quarto render`, deterministic and content-addressed — rebuilds are
instant when nothing changed, and figures can never be stale because
there is nothing to forget to regenerate.

[Get started →](install.qmd)
